title: Log Aggregation at Scale (Fluentbit/Loki)
description: Implement high-throughput log aggregation pipelines using tools like Fluentbit and Loki. Architect scalable logging solutions that handle massive volumes while maintaining searchable labels and cost efficiency.
objectives: Implement high-throughput log aggregation pipelines using tools like Fluentbit and Loki.
Architect scalable logging solutions that handle massive volumes while maintaining searchable labels and cost efficiency.
